title: Vegapunk’s Broadcast — Chapter 1113
main_description: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth. This chapter contains 5 structured story parts and 148 cleaned dialogue lines.
key_events: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
The display-ready parts preserve the cleaned dialogue while keeping uncertain speakers clearly marked.
